scripts.security:headers: node scripts/write-static-headers.mjs && npm test -- --run tests/securityHeaders.test.ts tests/nextConfigSecurityHeaders.test.ts tests/securityHeaderAudit.test.ts
scripts.security:xss: npm test -- --run tests/readOnlyPacket.test.ts tests/submissionPackage.test.ts tests/supportHandoff.test.ts tests/preSubmissionChecklist.test.ts
scripts.security:auth: npm test -- --run tests/institutionAuth.test.ts tests/institutionAccountAdmin.test.ts tests/institutionAccountRegistry.test.ts tests/institutionAccountProvisioningHttp.test.ts tests/serverInstitutionAccountStore.test.ts tests/institutionSessionToken.test.ts tests/institutionSessionCookie.test.ts tests/institutionLogin.test.ts tests/institutionLoginHttp.test.ts tests/institutionAuditLog.test.ts tests/institutionAuditLedger.test.ts tests/institutionAuditLedgerHttp.test.ts tests/serverInstitutionAuditLedgerStore.test.ts tests/institutionServerRoutes.test.ts tests/authorizedOperatorCredential.test.ts
scripts.security:feeds: npm run security:feed-keys && npm test -- --run tests/authorizedFeedAccess.test.ts tests/authorizedIntelligenceFeed.test.ts tests/authorizedFeedSignature.test.ts tests/authorizedFeedKeyRegistryScript.test.ts tests/AuthorizedFeedPanel.test.tsx tests/digitalCrimeRouteKnowledge.test.ts tests/promotionSurfaceIntelligence.test.ts tests/learningStore.test.ts
scripts.desktop:package:dir: npm run desktop:export && node scripts/prepare-desktop-app-dir.mjs && node scripts/package-desktop-dir.mjs
scripts.desktop:package:signed: npm run desktop:export && node scripts/prepare-desktop-app-dir.mjs && npm run desktop:release:check && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.build:server: npm run server:routes:materialize && npm run security:deployment && next build
scripts.build:server:production: npm run server:routes:materialize && npm run security:server-readiness && next build
scripts.ci:verify: npm run security:headers && npm run security:xss && npm run security:auth && npm run security:feeds && npm run security:deployment && npm run security:secrets && npm run security:audit && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
